title: continuity-report.md (extracted structure)
description: The on-disk artifact is markdown, not JSON, so the schema applies to the dict produced by schema_audit.py's markdown extractor (it reads the H1/H2/H3 hierarchy and verdict line). Writer: skills/continuity-check/scripts/rules_audit.py.

title.description: From the H1 line. Pattern: '<project> — Continuity audit'.

run_date.description: Optional. From the italic 'Run: YYYY-MM-DD' line.

verdict.description: From the bold token under '## Verdict'. Anything else is schema drift.
